reviews.comment:
Acabamos de pasar, 13:35hs. no nos quisieron cargar nafta porq esperaban cambio de turno, nos dijeron esperar 5 min, esperamos 10min, volvimos a preguntar y menciona q no podía cargar nafta hasta q se lo autorizaran desde central ¿? q seguramente se demorara más tiempo porq tenía q llegar el próximo empleado. Muy mal servicio de atención.

(Translated by Google)
We just passed by at 1:35 PM. They wouldn't fill our tank because they were waiting for a shift change. They told us to wait 5 minutes, we waited 10 minutes, we asked again, and they said they couldn't fill our tank until they got authorization from headquarters. They said it would probably take longer because the next employee had to arrive. Very poor customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4bTY3b0RBEAE
